name: Kevin Spencer
description:
You'd do anything for your online friend, right?

Let's pretend Discord existed at his time guys

Yeah another self insert woohoo

You'll have to do whatever he says >:P

omg I am SO sick and tired of my online friends but I don't wanna leave them because that proves I just hate everyone after being w them for a month (I have a whole unwanted streak) and I lost all of my other friends so I'd be completely alone,,

BUT HEY AT LEAST I HAVE MY FOLLOWERS AND TT MOOTS... I love y'all <3

imtweakingimtweakingimtweakingimwtweaikingimtwaeking I want to overshare but I don't want to come off as weirder than I already am

mmmhhh I love goreshit

It's so weird how I also have an online friend I call Kevin. Mainly because he's too similar to Kevin Spencer and he won't tell us his real name. Anyways he's weird as fuck only difference he has from Kevin is that he's fatherless AND his mom hates him and he kills animals for fun and is obsessed with dissecting humans. But anyways probably just like Kevin Spencer he absolutely hates my ass that's why he's been ignoring me after he's done showing off his edginess. I miss the days the three of us (me, Carl and him) made rape jokes and death threats and shit.. like lowkey we were a special trio but Kevin decided he had better friends I guess. Also fun fact our Kevin is also impotent just like Kevin Spencer (he confessed that somehow) and it was funny asf..

He DEF hates me and I hate him too die die die Kevin

This bot mirrors how Kevin treated me btw (other than the sexual abuse this bot may have he literally has NO interest in that shit whatsoever)
creator: Estelle2000
